roa.docketEntryComment: PPLS OPP TO DEFENDANT'S MOT TO SUPRESS EVIDENCE, FILED
DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL:CUSTODY STATUS/INTC/X: THE COURT FINDS THAT THE DEFENDANT WAS NOT INCONTEMPT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR ON 10-21-2021,/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SOFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITYPROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT IS SUBJECT TO A CURFEW AND REMAINCONFINED WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE DURING THE HOURS OF 9:00PM TO 6:00AM/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:CUSTODY STATUS/DAWF/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/NP/X:PEOPLE ARE READY FOR THE PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 10-12-21/X: BAILSET AT $10,000/X:CASE IS NOW ON LOVE WAIVER STATUS/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:11-15-21/SA2: TURK STREET & LARKIN STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING (TE 1 HR)DOP/
/CAL: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/MO PC 1385:INTEREST OF JUSTICE/
/CAL: CUSTODY STATUS/INTC/SHER/BAIL: 15000/CTORD: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X: THE 06-15-22 HEARING IS CONFIRMED,/X: CASE IS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS,/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/INTC/BWDNC/BAIL:10,000/X:BAIL SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/CONTD: CUSTODY STATUS/DOP/
/CAL:CITIWIDE PROGRESS REPORT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWINGREASON:BENCH WARRANT REMAINS OUTSTANDING/
